{{Expand}}

{{Infobox location
| name = Izyrian court
| introduced = ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness
}}

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|An [[Izyrian court]] would likely find a separate offender and hang them rather than treating them as an accomplice.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c19">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 19</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Of Dawn and Darkness]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
[[Category:Elder Empire locations]]
